channel.title: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)
channel.description:
Hi guys,
I just wanted to let you guys know that for the last couple of weeks I have been working on a Frontity theme based on [tufte-css](https://github.com/edwardtufte/tufte-css) in my spare time.
I have written about this [here](https://blog.vomkonstant.in/2019/12/02/frontity-upgrading-my-wordpress-game-with-react/) and followed up with [this post.](https://blog.vomkonstant.in/2019/12/09/frontity-discovering-the-principles/)
This will probably stay a personal project and not ever reaching the robustness needed to be widely used, but I'm still looking forward to redesigning my blog this way.
I'm curious about what you think though, please let me know your thoughts and suggestions!
Cheers, K

item.title: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Great, thanks Konstantin!

Read full topic
item.source: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)

item.title: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)
item.dc:creator: Konstantin
item.description:
Hey lads,

thanks for the kind words, I appreciate the support!
I am actually making good progress on the project so far and I will definitely keep you posted (and ask a question or two in the “Questions”-section )

By the way, is that ok if I share your posts in this month’s newsletter?

I’d be delighted if you did @Reyes!

Will post updates as soon as I reach noteworthy milestones!

So long,
Konstantin

Read full topic
item.source: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)

item.title: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Konstantin:

I have written about this here and followed up with this post.

I loved them too

And I really like the tufte-css look & feel.

Please keep us posted!

Read full topic
item.source: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)

item.title: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
@konstantin Welcome to Frontity and thanks for sharing your journey. Can’t wait to see the final result

Read full topic
item.source: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)

item.title: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @Konstantin!

I have written about this here and followed up with this post.

I found these super interesting, thanks for sharing and for committing to write about your experience! I’m sure this will be very helpful for other users.

If there is anything at all we can help with, let us know!

By the way, is that ok if I share your posts in this month’s newsletter?

Read full topic
item.source: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)

item.title: I have commited to redoing my blog with Frontity (and wrote about it)
item.dc:creator: Konstantin
item.description:
Hi guys,

I just wanted to let you guys know that for the last couple of weeks I have been working on a Frontity theme based on tufte-css in my spare time.

I have written about this here and followed up with this post.

This will probably stay a personal project and not ever reaching the robustness needed to be widely used, but I’m still looking forward to redesigning my blog this way.

I’m curious about what you think though, please let me know your thoughts and suggestions!

Cheers,
K

Read full topic
